kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: Verify Admin Can View Report Detail

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[normalize-space()="เข้าสู่ระบบ"]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'ผู้แจ้ง'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'หัวข้อ'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'ขับรถและพูดจาไม่สุภาพ'.
kw.arg: ขับรถและพูดจาไม่สุภาพ
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'รายละเอียด'.
kw.arg: รายละเอียด
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'คนขับ ขับรถหวาดเสียวและตะโกนด่ารถคันอื่นๆ ตลอด'.
kw.arg: คนขับ ขับรถหวาดเสียวและตะโกนด่ารถคันอื่นๆ ตลอด
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'ประเภทเหตุการณ์'.
kw.arg: ประเภทเหตุการณ์
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath=//span[contains(text(),"คนขับ")]'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'ระดับความสำคัญ'.
kw.arg: ระดับความสำคัญ
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'สถานะปัจจุบัน'.
kw.arg: สถานะปัจจุบัน
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'รอดำเนินการ'.

kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'ตำแหน่งเหตุการณ์'.
kw.arg: ตำแหน่งเหตุการณ์
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath=//*[contains(@class,"gm-style") or contains(@class,"leaflet")]'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'อัปเดตล่าสุด'.
kw.arg: อัปเดตล่าสุด
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'วันที่แจ้ง'.
kw.arg: วันที่แจ้ง
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
